text:
From <https://matrix.to/#/!qszfwuHFfPXPcqiZSg:libera.chat/$7N4pXXy76efjiXLkdpMdLElXUTfF6phnyIdrcZ3qyXQ?via=libera.chat&via=matrix.org> (#freebsd in IRC):

>

<https://github.com/vermaden/lsblk/blob/master/README.md>
